Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Yerin's master]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin's master died near the door of the Ancestor's Tomb after being poisoned and stabbed.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin's master is the strongest sacred artist she has ever met.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin's master is a Sword Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Yerin's master used a Steelborn body.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Yerin's master has a Remnant sealed in her core.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Yerin's master has pills that can regrow limbs.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Yerin's master reached Underlord at about the same age she was.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin has a connection to her master.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
